correction: JarvisReadinessGate now uses runtime fleet readiness, not only cloud API readiness
before: standard_ready blocked when no cloud LLM provider available
after: standard_ready when ANY capable governed runtime exists (Claude Code, Codex, shell, etc.)
key_changes: Added _detect_runtime_fleet() — detects Claude Code, Shell, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, Ollama, cloud API
standard_ready = no blocking issues AND has capable runtime
deterministic_only_ready = no blocking issues (runtime not required)
Cloud API exhaustion is a warning, not a blocker
